resources.string: 1. Ensure the SIM card you want to sign in with is set as your primary data line.
2. Ensure you are connected to Safaricom mobile data on your primary data line.
3. Ensure your VPN is turned off.
To scan, M-PESA requires access to your device\'s camera.
Are you sure to delete the phone number %s? It is unrecoverable once done
get your phone number to contact you
The phone number has already existed, are you sure to use it?
Click here to resend after %d seconds
Save your phone number for next time
Enter the city name to search
Enter the region name to search
We have sent an SMS verification code to you
We will send an SMS verification code to your phone number
You are adding to your favourites. You can give a more memorable name
Please note that this feature can make mistakes. Please confirm the details before proceeding
You have successfully purchased airtime worth %s for %s.
You have successfully purchased airtime worth %s.
Help Us Keep My OneApp Account Secure Yet Seamless at Login

To enhance the security and login experience of your account, My OneApp requires permissions to your phone dialer for authentication.

If you allow access:
You will grant the permission and receive an authentication One Time Password (OTP) once during your first login. Future logins will be faster, seamless and still secure.

If you don\'t allow access:
You will be required, from time to time, to authenticate with a One Time Password (OTP) using your Safaricom SIM card and with mobile data enabled.

Granting access helps keep your account secure while simplifying your login experience.
An eSIM is a digital version of the SIM card identifying your device virtually to provide seamless network connection
Listen to your favourite Gospel music and life your spirit and soul
Please allow the app to access device usage data to continue.
Are you sure you want to end your PostPay plan?
The authorized fatigue limit is reached
The user selected the disallow authorization option
pushWindow cannot be used for transparent Windows
The WebSocket corresponding to the appId and SocketTaskID already exists.
The network type does not match, so the download will not be performed
Messages cannot be sent until the connection is established.
The operation could not be completed. None Route to the host
The URL address is not ws or wss.
Server specified Sec-WebSocket-Protocol that wasn\'t requested.
Cannot allocate memory for the current Websocket connection.

You don’t have enough balance to complete this transaction.

Certificate verification failed, System is Under Maintenance

Check your internet connection and try again

Together, we’re building something better. Thank you for being part of this journey.

Earn 1 point for every 10 Ksh spent on voice calls, SMS, or data with Safaricom\'s Bonga Points loyalty program.

By tapping ‘Allow’ you consent to allowing Safaricom to collect and use your information as stated above, and have agreed to Safaricom’s Privacy Policy Statement.
To scan, OneApp requires access to your device\'s camera.
Camera permission required to scan QR code
Allow this app to access your camera when you use the app?
Allow camera permissions so you can scan quickly.
We can’t access your camera just yet

Sorry, the new PIN cannot be the same as the old MPIN. Please try again.
Sorry, PIN mismatch, Please try again.
You are about to set up your Service PIN for your line.
Check your internet connection, then refresh.
Checking Service PIN status, Please wait …
Face is already suspended by your phone system because of too many times of failure.
Fingerprint is already suspended by your phone system because of too many times of failure.

Select preferred pin to access your Data & Airtime usage statement
Click button, put QR code in the frame and pay
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
In order to ensure the normal use of the app, please open the permissions
In order to ensure the normal use of the app, please open the permissions
You are adding to your favourites. You can give a \nmore memorable name
Your complaint has been captured and shall be actioned upon.
You are about to allow receiving all promotional messages.
You are about to allow %1$s to send you promotional messages.
You are about to stop receiving promotional messages from %1$s.
You are about to stop receiving all promotional messages.
OneApp requires access to your device\'s contacts.
Allow contact permissions so we can help you find numbers faster.
We can’t access your contacts just yet
Allow this application to access your address book when you use the app?
To pay Ksh. %1$s to %2$s (%3$s) will cost Ksh. %4$s

1. At most one merchant coupon and one sp coupon can be used in one payment order. \n2. When both one merchant coupon and one sp coupon are used, the system will first apply the merchant coupon and then the sp coupon.\n3. User can change coupons to be used. If the selected coupons cannot be used together, the system preferentially retains the coupons selected last.
You’ve switched off data collection — but no worries, you can turn it back on whenever you like.
Your airtime will not be used once your bundles run out.
Request your family or friends to share their data bundles with you. Once they accept the request, the data balance will appear here.
Do you wish to Decline this request?

You are about to remove your %1$s %2$s limit

Dear customer, you currently do not have any beneficiaries added.

OD Enabling Failure And Activation Failure

Please write horizontally in the blank
Cannot obtain sufficient signature characteristics, please try again
Verify to ensure complete ID is visible with edges and there is no glare or blurred text.
No newspaper bought yet. You will have access to your newspapers for 7 days from the day of purchase

Looks like this is your default phone number. We’ll send you an OTP to verify it.

Enjoy a worry-free calling and messaging experience by purchasing a bundle that best fits you.
Your device is currently on a 2G network, speed tests may not perform optimally.
You are editing your favourite. You can give a more memorable name to find easily

It looks like you\'re starting fresh here. You have no notifications.

You do not have any active subscriptions.
Your device\'s location is disabled. Please enable it to continue.
The end time must be later than the start time.

Something went wrong. Please try again.

Unable to read your phone number. Please login again.

Too many attempts. Please try again later.

You have been awarded 5GB bundles valid for 24 Hours. 


To enjoy 5G fast speeds ensure you’re browsing with a 5G ready device and in a 5G zone.

Share your Data and allow family, friends or your other SIM cards to use your bundles without having to sambaza.

Create the perfect monthly plan for you by selecting your desired data and/or minutes valid for 30 days.
Choose the perfect bundle to keep you and your loved ones connected, anytime — paired with an active Home Fibre plan.
Share Data & Minutes with your Family easily.
Just a heads up — You’re about to share full access to your Data and minutes from your Family Share account.
Just a heads up — You’re about to share full access to your Data and Minutes from your Family Share account.
Just a heads up — You’re about to share full access to your Data from your Family Share account.
Just a heads up — You’re about to share full access to your Minutes from your Family Share account.

All bundles come with free WhatsApp
This is a continuous overdraft service that allows M-PESA customers to complete their M-PESA transactions even when they do not have enough funds in their M-PESA account
You have insufficient funds on M-PESA.\nYou are about to

Please open the camera access rights of this application in Settings

Phone permission denied. Enable phone access to continue with eSIM setup.
The eSIM cost for Prepaid Swap is KES 150 and for Postpaid Swap is free of charge.
Payments will be via M-PESA only.
You can only request an eSIM for your own number.

Enjoy seamless and fast Wi-Fi internet at home with multiple connection capability
Get connected to Kenya’s first 5G network. Future of Smart Living is here

Confirm you are opting out of Family Share. Your plan remains active until %1$s and will not renew. You can continue to manage your beneficiaries until the plan expires.
You don\'t have an active Home Fibre plan. Proceed to add Home Fibre plan and add-ons.
Your current plan does not support add-ons. Proceed to change plan to add add-on.
You don’t have an active Home Fibre plan. Renew it first so you can buy add-ons.
You are about to restart your router. Select your account number to proceed. This will only take a few minutes.
You are about to restart router for account %1$s. This will only take a few minutes.
You are about to disable auto-renewal on your account. After doing so, you will need to manually renew your subscription once your current Plan expires. Would you like to continue?
Dear Customer you cannot pay for this plan as the postpay subscription is active.

Hang on tight. This will only take a few minutes.
Your request to purchase %1$s for %2$s has failed.
You have successfully purchased %1$s for %2$s via M-PESA.
Something went wrong. Please check your internet connection
Your Available Balance is the amount of money you have previously overpaid. It’s the excess funds available in your account, which can be applied to future payments.
Cash-back is any amount credited back to your account.
Reduces the amount to pay to %1$s
Enter the amount you would like to add to your Home Fiber account. You will complete the payment via M-PESA in the next step.

We’ll invite you in once it’s hot and ready! Tap the button below and select Leave beta on the Play Store to download the M-PESA App. This ensures that you leave the beta program and get the official M-PESA App release.
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
Limit should be less than %1$s in MBs or less than %2$s in GBs
You have not set your limit. Tap the button to get started.
New limit should not be the same as the previous one set.
The app gathers location and device metrics, including in the background, to provide key network insights and improve your overall experience.
You are about to log out from this device clearing all transaction frequents. To use this device you will have to sign in again.
Log your location and network data for Review and Troubleshooting.
New passwords entered twice are inconsistent.
The new password entered is the same as the old password.
Before login, please agree with Terms & Conditions first
For the security of your account, we\'ve added an extra layer of protection. You will be required to enter an OTP for the next few logins.

The app collects network and cell service data, even in the background, to optimize your experience based on the service quality in your area.

Got a dual SIM? If you\'d like to use your other number, just make sure that SIM is set as the default one.
Please note that if you have dual sim and would like to use the other number, you need to have that SIM card as the default.
We’re done here — your turn now. You’ll feel right at home in no time.
Check your M-PESA, data, minutes, and airtime — no switching apps, it’s all right here.
Invest, borrow, shop. Discover apps that help you manage your lifestyle.
Your profile, Get Support and App Settings all live here.
Buy bundles, send money, or pay bills — it’s all here. You can also tap ‘View All’ to see more, and ‘edit’ your Quick Actions to suit your routine.
Skip the typing — just scan, confirm, pay and you’re done.
Just search for it. Bundles, bills, even your favourite mini app — all one quick tap away
All your balances in one view. ��

 P.O Box 66827- 08000, Nairobi 
 + 254 722 003 272

Service PIN is used for Safaricom services like Bonga Points transfers. It’s different from your M-PESA PIN and helps keep your actions secure.
You can now use your Service PIN services like Bonga Points Transfer. Remember that this is not your M-PESA PIN

Please enter an amount greater than or equal to 50 and less than or equal to 500
